title: Flower fix
description: Fixes the texture of flowers (among other things) not reflecting properly on the back facing side of the model
body:
A resource pack that fixes block models so that they flip correctly when viewed from the back.

Example of the issue:

- Looking south ![Vanilla cornflower looking south](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1047aebb78e1f10b8c93546b3700579f17cddf4f.png)
- Looking north ![Vanilla cornflower looking north](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5feeeb8f885d831dc44886b4618720a56a252b5.png)

With flower fix, this issue no longer occurs

This should be compatible with most other resource packs, I would recommend giving them higher priority.
On pre 1.20.2 versions, you can ignore the "made for a newer version of minecraft" warning.
